title: attributes — model relationships
description: Three owned entities. Internal graph: AttributeGroup belongsTo AttributeSet (cascade); AttributeSet references definitions via ordered JSONB array (definition_order), not FK. External graph: hosts opt in via traits — no FK from host to AttributeSet by default (except when historic rendering demands set_id snapshot on the host).

internal.description: Groups cascade with their set. Superseding a set (creating a new version) creates a new set of groups; old groups stay via SoftDeletes.
Ordered reference in a JSONB column. Enforced by application logic — RefuseDefinitionDeleteWithRecordedValues hook refuses delete when any set references it.

inbound.description: Downstream modules attach via TRAITS + ATTRIBUTES, not FKs. Hosts compose `HasAttributeSet` and declare `#[AttributableEntity]`.
consumer_patterns: any model with `#[AttributableEntity(entityType: X, discriminator: sport_key)]` — registered as a host at boot
any model with `use HasAttributeSet` — resolves the active set at read + validates values on save

consumed.usage: HasAuditable on definitions + sets + groups — every change is audit-material.
attributes.custom_definitions.max slot per tenant (Medium+ can define custom attributes; Small uses seeded defaults only).
